raw_consumer_statement: I contacted Barclays bank credit card and told them that I could not get online anymore. My password was changed. My address was changed. My phone number was changed and I could not get onto to see what was going on or even pay my bill I got a notice that I paid {$400.00} automatic which I never signed up for so I questioned it with no results then I got a notice of {$7000.00} was paid to my credit card that I did not authorize or have the money for when I finally got into my account after they changed everything it took two weeks I found all these charges in XXXX that I have not made and payments from banks I dont have and now theyre being returned and my bill went from 2000 and something over to XXXX and they tell me everything is legit
